title: cyphostemma pseudomanikense
intro: Cyphostemma pseudomanikense is a species of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae), native to the tropical forests of the Comoros Islands. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cyphostemma pseudomanikense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In traditional medicine, Cyphostemma pseudomanikense is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and the leaves and stems are used in various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions.
